strengths: Demonstrated hands-on experience building event-driven systems and agentic workflows, including MCP frameworks at re:cinq.
Proven track record in scaling technical systems across fintech-adjacent domains (pricing, data integration, real-time inference) with high-throughput architectures.
Strong engineering culture contributions through testing frameworks, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing, including open-source tooling and workshops.
concerns: Lack of explicit evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments with financial decisioning consequences.
No clear indication of experience managing engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Limited visibility into experience with financial compliance, auditability infrastructure, or cross-jurisdictional regulatory requirements.
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong technical depth in event-driven systems, real-time infrastructure, and emerging agentic tooling, with relevant fintech-adjacent experience — but lacks demonstrable leadership at executive scale and direct exposure to regulated financial AI systems, which are core to the role.
